title: Caching Strategies Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on different database caching patterns.

questions.question: Which of these is the most common caching pattern used in multi-tier applications?
What is a 'Cache Miss'?
options: Data not found in the cache, requiring retrieval from the primary source
Deleting a record from the cache by mistake
A cache that is too small

questions.question: Which caching pattern writes data initially only to the cache and syncs it to the database in the background?
When should you use caching to improve performance?
options: Only for data that changes on every request
Primarily for frequently read but infrequently changed data

questions.question: Which of these is a popular tool for distributed caching?
